# NEXIATA

> NEXIATA is a premium web engineering agency that designs and builds fast,
> secure, modern websites and web applications. Currently in pre-launch; the
> public site goes live on 1 August 2026.

## About

- Type: Web engineering / web development agency
- Status: Coming soon (launch 1 August 2026)
- Contact: hello@nexiata.com
- Website: https://nexiata.com

## Services

- Web products: Business websites, portfolio websites, landing pages, e-commerce stores, progressive web apps, membership websites
- Web applications: Admin dashboards, SaaS applications, authentication systems, blog & CMS integration, real-time web apps, custom portals & intranets
- Integrations & performance: API integration, payment integration, performance optimization
- Code & maintenance: Website redesign, website maintenance, AI/vibe code cleanup, AI code security audit, bug fixing, code review & best practices

## Tech stack

- Frontend: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, Next.js server actions, Go
- Databases: MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Supabase, Neon, Firebase Firestore
- Auth: JWT, OAuth (Google), Clerk, Firebase Auth, Supabase Auth
- Cloud & hosting: Vercel, Netlify, Firebase Hosting, Cloudflare, Render, Railway

## Capabilities

- Mobile-friendly responsive design
- Technical SEO and Core Web Vitals optimization
- Fast loading speed and image optimization
- Secure authentication
- Contact forms, Google Maps, WhatsApp chat, social media and analytics integrations
- Clean, maintainable, scalable architecture on reliable cloud hosting
